name: anchorage
description: Anchorage protocol monorepo — contracts, server, web read-UI, and adversary testbed.

scripts.typecheck:tests: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/testbed/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.test.json
